title: Live results: Green goes head-to-head with Menefee in Texas House primary
author: The Hill Staff
fullText: Rep. Al Green (D) is running in a Tuesday primary in the Lone Star State’s 18th Congressional District after he was redistricted out of Texas’s 9th Congressional District earlier this year. He is facing off with incumbent Rep. Christian Menefee, teeing up a generational battle within the party. Other incumbents seeking to retain their seat…
